Sagi Shorrer

Mentor by Skippr AI

Mentor by Skippr AI

Maker

📌

Hey PH 👋 Sagi here, founder & CEO of Skippr AI (backed by Bessemer Venture Partners and some other cool investors).

In the last year or so we've been obsessed with what happens when an AI agent can actually see your product, talk to your users, and act, live. Not a chatbot in the corner. A real (human-level) presence inside your product. [...] We optimized for scale and lost the floor staff.

Skippr puts that layer back. Think Apple Store Genius Bar energy inside your product, instead of a laminated FAQ binder. An agent that’s present in real time and handles onboarding, activation, demos, and support like a person would.

What impressed me when I tested it:

→ It doesn’t just tell users what to click. It clicks. Built-in browser automation means the agent completes actions on screen, which is the difference between a tour guide and a driver

→ It holds agenda and memory across an entire session instead of resetting like most conversational tools

→ Speaks 10 languages out of the box, so your onboarding works in São Paulo as well as it does in San Francisco

## The AI employee that does the work, in Slack & Teams

4.9•13 reviews•

1.8K followers

Visit website

Slack apps

•

AI Workflow Automation

•

AI Agents

Your AI tools answer questions. Viktor does the work. It lives in Slack and Microsoft Teams, connects to 3,200+ tools across your stack, and acts on its own. It watches how your team works, spots problems before anyone notices, and proposes automations built around how your company actually works. It manages campaigns, builds apps, delivers reports, and writes code. And it runs for weeks without losing context, learning your company deeper every day. Not a chatbot. An AI employee. [...] Lastly, when Viktor is working on something complex, sometimes you're waiting a minute or two for the response. It's not instant like a chatbot because he's actually running code and doing real work, not just generating text. Once you understand that, it makes sense. But the first time you're staring at a loading screen, you wonder if something broke. [...] 4.9

Based on 13 reviews

Review viktor.com?

Reviewers describe Viktor as a Slack-based coworker that can actually carry out work across many tools, with the strongest praise coming from solo operators and small teams using it for marketing, admin, reporting, CRM, web work, and custom workflows. They repeatedly highlight strong context retention, broad integrations, and meaningful time savings. The main complaints are practical: credits can burn quickly, pricing can feel high, some integrations and APIs are missing, and complex jobs may need clearer prompting, better visibility, or occasional correction. A founder of PACT | Privacy Audit & Compliance Tool also praised its accurate troubleshooting and proactive fixes.
